news.paragraph: Johnson & Johnson is experiencing positive momentum following an upgrade by Leerink Partners to Outperform with an increased price target. Market sentiment is being bolstered by growth expectations surrounding the company's blockbuster drug pipeline and its strategic focus on immunology products. Traders should consider this recent analyst optimism and the evolving drug strategy when evaluating potential price movement.
headlines: JNJ gets Wall Street boost as blockbuster drug bets ignite growth hopes
Leerink Partners Upgrades Johnson & Johnson to Outperform From Market Perform, Adjusts PT to $265 From $252
